name: Singularity Grenade
description: A Hyperion singularity grenade that creates a brief gravitational pull before detonating, dragging nearby enemies toward the impact point. It is a strong crowd control tool against groups, especially when paired with splash-damage weapons that can punish the clustered pull.
notes:
The initial pull does not affect the player, but the final blast still can. Pull strength drops off with distance, and heavier enemies resist it more than lighter ones.

Even when the explosion misses, the suction can interrupt or stagger enemies long enough to let you escape or reposition. It can also drag enemies over ledges or into environmental hazards.

special.description: Forms a singularity just before detonation and pulls nearby enemies inward.
